background: Homeworld: Walkriver/Oriah (E434642-8). Former Imperial soldier who led a mutiny after witnessing corruption that got her squad killed. Escaped and joined Solomani forces. 'Wildfire' nickname from her quick temper and even quicker reflexes.
terms: Army (Cavalry): Gun Combat (slug)-1, Recon-1, Survival-1. Served in Imperial Army cavalry unit on frontier worlds. Advanced to rank 1.
Army (Cavalry): Gun Combat (slug)-2, Tactics (military)-1. Witnessed incompetent commanding officer's actions result in squad deaths. Led mutiny. Forced to flee Imperial service.
Marine (Support): Navigation-1, Pilot (small craft)-1. Escaped into Solomani space. Joined Solomani Marine Corps under false identity. Advanced to rank 1.
Marine (Support): Gun Combat (slug)-3, Heavy Weapons (portable)-1, Navigation-2. Proved herself in combat against pirates. Recommended for special operations.
Scout: Survival-2, Recon-2. Transferred to Scout Service for covert operations. Experience in hostile environments.

Agent (Intelligence): Stealth-1, Athletics (dexterity)-1. Recruited by SolSec for combat operations. Strong moral code sometimes conflicts with orders. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Advanced to rank 2. Mustering out: Gauss Rifle, Combat Armor, Tactical Goggles, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Combat tactics, sniper operations, survival in hostile environments, small craft piloting, reconnaissance
Weaknesses: Will disobey orders that violate her moral code, protective of civilians to fault, suspicious of authority, anger management issues
